name: product-title-optimizer
description: Optimize Google Shopping product titles using real search data from Google Ads. Pulls products and search terms, researches keywords across three sources, generates optimized titles, and exports a supplemental feed for Google Merchant Center.

gomarble_api_key.description: Your GoMarble API key. Get it free at https://apps.gomarble.ai/setup/integrations — sign in with Google, connect your Google Ads account, then generate an API key.
